name: Peanutty Chewy Bars
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2 Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3 In a large bowl, stir together flour, granulated sugar, cocoa, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt. Add butter; cut in with a pastry blender or hands until the mixture is well blended, resembling coarse crumbs.
4 Add eggs; mix well.
5 Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan, pressing firmly onto the bottom of the pan.
6 Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the mixture is set. Remove from the oven and sprinkle peanut butter chips on top.
7 Drizzle sweetened condensed milk evenly over the chips.
8 Top with coconut flakes.
9 Return to the oven; bake for an additional 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly browned on top.
10 Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
11 Cut into bars. Approximately 24 bars.
